creator: aragon@phat.za.net
text:
I just eagerly updated to 7.1-PRERELEASE to try the 2.6 linux emulation updates that fix Flash 9 support. (working great btw)

I hit my head against the linux_base-f8 port because it has one distfile which is outdated and doesn't exist on any of the Fedora mirrors.  See these URLs for details of the update:

http://fedoraproject.org/wiki/New_signing_key
https://www.redhat.com/archives/fedora-announce-list/2008-August/msg00012.html
http://hany.sk/~hany/RPM/f-updates-8-i386/fedora-release-8-6.transition.noarch.html

I've updated the port and attached a diff.  Please could you review and commit - I think a lot of people will need this for 7.1-RELEASE. :)

Fix: attached...


Patch attached with submission follows:
